title: Cloud Photo Storage
drDigitalIntro:
Cloud storage keeps a copy of your photos online.
• If a device is lost or broken, your photos are still safe.
• Photos sync automatically across your devices.
• Most services give some free space and charge for more.
drDigitalSuccess: Cloud storage keeps your photos safe even if your device breaks. Set it up once and it works automatically!
drDigitalHint: Just read and click Continue when you're ready.
